content.title: Seamless integration with your favorite tools
content.subtitle: We support a workflow designed to help you connect briefs, specs, and preview deploys in minutes.

items.question: Do I need to write code?
items.answer: No. You provide a brief and section toggles. Livo generates the page spec JSON and the template renders it.

items.question: How does the brief to page workflow work?
items.answer: Share who the page is for, what you're offering, and which sections to include. Nexus turns that into structured content for every slot on the page.

items.question: What is the page spec JSON file?
items.answer: It is the generated page definition with resolved theme tokens, section variants, and copy. The landing template reads it and renders the full page without custom JSX.

items.question: How do preview deploys work?
items.answer: Once the spec is generated, the template renders the page and publishes a preview URL you can share with stakeholders immediately.

items.question: Can I change the section order?
items.answer: The stack order is fixed for consistency and conversion. You can enable or disable optional sections: perks, features, connect, comparison, and faq.

items.question: Where do themes live?
items.answer: Theme presets stay private in Livo. The generated JSON includes resolved design tokens only.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes. Starter includes one workspace, preview deploys, and core sections at no cost. That is enough to validate an offer before upgrading.

items.question: What does the Team plan include?
items.answer: Team is built for repeated launches: unlimited previews, visual regeneration, and priority support for teams shipping pages every week.

items.question: Do you offer enterprise or custom pricing?
items.answer: Scale is available for agencies and larger orgs with custom domains, dedicated support, and SLA options. Contact us when you need a tailored setup.

items.question: Which integrations are supported?
items.answer: Nexus connects briefs, specs, and preview deploys with the tools you already use. See the connect section for the integration hub.

content.headline: Elevate your experience with us
content.subheadline: Ready to get started? Sign up now and start your journey. We are here to help you grow.
